name: Rob Portman
subject: Merry Christmas
body:
| Peter \--

Merry Christmas from Jane, me, and the entire Portman family! We are so thankful for all of your help and support this year, and I hope you get the chance over the holiday season to relax and spend some time with your friends and family.

I am looking forward to the coming year, and I’m excited about the opportunity to continue to get things done for our state and nation.

All best,

Rob Portman [](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_16&n=1)[](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_16&n=2)[

](https://www.robportman.com/donate?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_16&n=3)
---

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www.robportman.com/unsubscribe?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_16&n=4). -=-=-
